name: Twitter/X
description: Search tweets, read threads, and explore trending topics on X (formerly Twitter)

user_stories.i_want: to search for tweets about a specific topic
user_stories.so_that: I can gauge public sentiment and find breaking news

user_stories.i_want: to see what's currently trending on X
user_stories.so_that: I know what the world is talking about right now

user_stories.i_want: to read a full thread from a specific user's profile
user_stories.so_that: I can follow their complete train of thought on a topic
